overview: PEAK Integrative Medicine provides personalized, direct primary care combining medical services, chiropractic care, functional medicine, and lifestyle medicine. Treatment approaches include conventional medicine, IV therapy, PEMF therapy, hyperbaric oxygen, and red light therapy tailored to address acute and chronic conditions.
highlights: Direct provider access via text, email, video, phone
IV therapy, PEMF therapy, hyperbaric oxygen, red light therapy
targetAudience: Families and individuals seeking integrated primary care with emphasis on preventive wellness and chronic disease management.
